## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a skill step was incorrect or broken)
- [ ] Improvement (better prompts, clearer instructions, more detail)
- [ ] New skill (new SKILL.md + assets)

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML frontmatter (`name` and `description`)
- [ ] If new skill: added to `claude-plugin.json` and `README.md` skills table
- [ ] All referenced `assets/` and `references/` files exist
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a brief entry
